scripts.build:apk:
cd android && env NODE_ENV=production JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk PATH=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk/bin:$PATH ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleRelease -PreactNativeArchitectures=arm64-v8a -Pexpo.useLegacyPackaging=true && ln -f app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-arm64.apk && echo '
✅ APK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-arm64.apk'
scripts.build:apk:universal:
cd android && env JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk PATH=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk/bin:$PATH ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleRelease && echo '
✅ APK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk'
scripts.build:apk:debug:
cd android && env JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk PATH=/usr/lib/jvm/java-17-openjdk/bin:$PATH ./gradlew --no-daemon assembleDebug && echo '
✅ APK: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'
